welcome.title: Welcome to GigBuddy
welcome.subtitle: Everything your band needs in one place: gigs, rehearsals, setlists and finances.
welcome.trialPitch: Try any paid plan free for 7 days. Cancel during the trial and you pay nothing.
welcome.haveInvite: Joining an existing band? Redeem your invite code

terms.mustAgree: Please agree to the terms to continue.

acceptTerms.title: Updated Terms & Conditions
acceptTerms.subtitle: We've updated our Terms & Conditions. Please review and accept them to continue.
acceptTerms.agree: I have read and agree to the Terms & Conditions

band.title: Set up your band
band.nameRequired: Enter your band name to continue.
band.slugCaveat: If this name is taken, a number is added automatically (e.g. {{slug}}-2).

summary.title: Almost there
summary.paymentNote: You'll choose your payment method on our payment provider's secure page. A one-time €0.01 verification charge starts your trial.
summary.freeNote: The free plan needs no payment details.
summary.resumeNote: Your band "{{name}}" was already created — we'll pick up where you left off.

checkout.success: Your subscription is active. Have fun!
checkout.timeout: Your payment is still being processed. You can enter the app — your plan activates automatically once the payment is confirmed.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load the subscription plans. Please try again.
errors.onboardingDisabled: New tenant onboarding is currently disabled. You can still join an existing band with an invite code.
errors.bandCapNoPointer: You already own a band, so onboarding isn't needed. You can manage plans in Settings.
errors.logoUploadFailed: The logo could not be uploaded — you can add it later under Profile.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
